title: anthemis pedunculata subsp. turolensis
intro: Anthemis pedunculata subsp. turolensis, also known as Turolense Chamomile, is a subspecies of Anthemis pedunculata, a flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Turolense Chamomile include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Turolense Chamomile can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
